PYACS 0.66.20

  • pyacs.lib.faultslip

  • View page source

pyacs.lib.faultslip.strike_dip_rake_to_dir

pyacs.lib.faultslip.strike_dip_rake_to_dir.strike_dip_rake_to_dir(strike, dip, rake)[source]

Return azimuth of horizontal motion for given (strike, dip, rake).

Parameters:

  • strike (float or numpy.ndarray) – Fault strike in decimal degrees.

  • dip (float or numpy.ndarray) – Fault dip in decimal degrees.

  • rake (float or numpy.ndarray) – Rake in decimal degrees.

Returns:

Slip direction in decimal degrees (modulo 180).

Return type:

float or numpy.ndarray
